description_long: This object consists of three large, rectangular shipping containers arranged side by side. Each container features corrugated metal sides and top, with reinforced corner posts and visible locking bars on the end doors. The containers are colored in rusty orange, blue, and red, each showing signs of weathering and use, such as subtle surface rust and worn paint. The doors are located at one end of each container, equipped with vertical locking bars and recessed paneling typical of intermodal freight containers. The containers are robust and industrial, designed for secure storage and transport of goods. Their size and construction suggest they are suitable for placement in shipping yards, industrial zones, or as temporary storage in urban environments.
description: Three large, weathered metal shipping containers in orange, blue, and red, with corrugated sides and reinforced doors. Designed for secure storage and transport, they show signs of industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the end doors of all three containers, highlighting the locking bars and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Top view displaying the corrugated metal roofs and the full length of the containers, with color differences clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid, closed backs of the containers, with no visible doors or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite top view, emphasizing the length and surface texture of the containers, with the orange container most prominent.
